summary: Tested refactored Product Page layout and Admin Armory modal. All features working correctly: Two-column layout (desktop), mobile purchase block at top with sticky CTA at bottom, tabbed admin modal with all 5 tabs (Basics, Content, Media, Access, SEO), enhanced SEO tab with all requested features, 'What It's Not' section correctly removed from Content tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product page refactor complete. Two-column layout works on desktop (left: content, right: sticky purchase block). Mobile has purchase block at top and sticky CTA bar at bottom. Admin modal uses tabs now instead of accordions. All 5 tabs tested: Basics, Content, Media, Access, SEO. SEO tab has Focus Keyword, char count bars, Google/Social previews, 9-item checklist, Generate SEO button.

details: Left column contains hero image and content sections (What This Is, Core Actions, etc.)
Right column has sticky purchase block (lg:w-[380px], sticky top-24)
Purchase block shows: product type badge, title, short description, price, CTA button, micro reassurance, Share, Save for Later
Purchase block appears at top (lg:hidden wrapper)
Sticky CTA bar at bottom (lg:hidden fixed bottom-0)
Both mobile elements hidden on desktop via lg:hidden class
Modal correctly uses tabs instead of accordions
5 tabs present: Basics, Content, Media, Access, SEO
Each tab has data-testid='tab-{id}' for testing
Tab switching works correctly
Product Title field (required)
URL Slug with Generate button
Product Type dropdown (Apps, Templates, Downloads, Courses, eBooks)
Sort Order field
Featured, Published, Archived checkboxes
Hero/Above the Fold section with Short Positioning Line and Price Status
What This Is textarea
Core Actions, What You Get, Features, How It Works list editors
Who It's For, Why It Works fields
Final CTA section
Tags editor
'What It's Not' section CORRECTLY REMOVED (verified not in DOM)
Hero Image upload with preview and remove button
Screenshots Gallery with Add Screenshot button
Video Embed URL field for YouTube/Vimeo
Primary Access URL field
Demo / Preview URL field
Direct File Download URL field
Free Product checkbox
Price and Price Note fields (shown when not free)
Focus Keyword field with helper text
SEO Title field with character count (0/60 chars)
Character count progress bar for title (color changes: yellow<40, green 40-60, red >60)
SEO Description field with character count (0/160 chars)
Character count progress bar for description (color changes: yellow<100, green 100-160, red >160)
OG Image URL field
Google Search Preview showing title, URL, description
Social Card Preview showing domain, title, description
SEO Checklist with 9 items (all with checkmark indicators)
Generate SEO from Content button with data-testid='ai-seo-assist-btn'
1. SEO title set
2. Title length optimal (30-60)
3. Meta description set
4. Description length optimal (100-160)
5. URL slug set
6. Focus keyword defined
7. Focus keyword in title
8. Tags added
9. Social image available
